commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=d2158214ec433b7677f0d840839c983e38e9016a)
commands.review_summary:
The PR threads a session cost value into slash `/status`, adds a conditional `Cost` column to `openclaw status`, and updates related docs and tests.

PR surface: Source +37, Tests +107, Docs +5. Total +149 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect by source inspection: current head maps `estimatedCostUsd` into status output, while current session persistence treats that field as a run snapshot rather than a cumulative session total. I did not run live proof because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs contributor or maintainer revision because the blocker is the cost-source semantics plus current-head proof, not a safe automated repair lane.

target.title: feat(status): show session costs
target.body:
## Summary
- Use persisted or bounded transcript-backed session cost for `/status` when available, so the status card can show session cost instead of only a pricing-table estimate.
- Add a conditional `Cost` column to `openclaw status` recent session rows when at least one shown session has persisted cost.
- Update status/cost docs for the new behavior.

## Linked context
Fixes #64334.

## Real behavior proof (required for external PRs)
Behavior addressed: `/status` and `openclaw status` now surface existing session cost data.
Real environment tested: Local source checkout on macOS 26.5.1 arm64, Node 22.23.0, using an isolated temporary OpenClaw proof state with one synthetic session store and transcript. The proof state contained no real channel credentials, account identifiers, or user chat content.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: Created an isolated `$PROOF` home/state directory, populated one `agent:main:main` session store with `estimatedCostUsd: 0.0063` and a transcript with matching assistant usage costs `0.0021` and `0.0042`, generated a `/status` response for that session, then captured it through `node scripts/run-node.mjs gateway call chat.history --json --params '{"sessionKey":"agent:main:main","agentId":"main","limit":2,"maxChars":20000}'`. Ran `openclaw status` against the same isolated state as a second proof path.
Evidence after fix: Copied slash `/status` output from the isolated gateway `chat.history` response:

```text
🦞 OpenClaw 2026.6.8 (c39a811)
🕘 Uptime: gateway 3m 57s · system 14d 21h
🧠 Model: anthropic/claude-opus-4-6
🧮 Tokens: 45 in / 32 out · 💵 Cost: $0.0063
🧮 Context: 77/32k (0%) · 🧹 Compactions: 0
🛢️ Session: agent:main:main • updated just now
⚙️ Execution: direct · Runtime: OpenClaw Default · Think: adaptive · Fast: off
🔌 Plugins: OK
🚗 Queue: steer (depth 0)
```

Supplemental real CLI output from the same isolated state showed the `openclaw status` Sessions table with the conditional `Cost` column:

```text
Sessions
┌───────────────────────────────────┬────────┬─────────┬─────────────────┬──────────────────┬────────────────┬─────────┐
│ Key                               │ Kind   │ Age     │ Model           │ Runtime          │ Tokens         │ Cost    │
├───────────────────────────────────┼────────┼─────────┼─────────────────┼──────────────────┼────────────────┼─────────┤
│ agent:main:main                   │ direct │ unknown │ claude-opus-4-6 │ OpenClaw Default │ 45/32k (0%)    │ $0.0063 │
└───────────────────────────────────┴────────┴─────────┴─────────────────┴──────────────────┴────────────────┴─────────┘
```

Observed result after fix: Both changed user-visible status paths displayed `$0.0063`, matching the persisted session cost and cumulative transcript usage costs `0.0021 + 0.0042` in the isolated proof state. The slash `/status` output showed `Cost: $0.0063`, and the CLI table showed `Cost` as `$0.0063`.
What was not tested: Real external messaging channels were not used for this proof; the slash-status evidence was captured from the local gateway history in an isolated proof state. The full test suite was not run locally for this proof step.

## Additional verification
- `corepack pnpm docs:list`
- `corepack pnpm check:docs`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/session-utils.fs.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test src/commands/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.test.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm test src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts`
- `corepack pnpm format:check src/status/status-message.ts src/auto-reply/status.test.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.ts src/commands/status.summary.ts src/commands/status.types.ts src/commands/status.command-sections.test.ts src/commands/status.command-report-data.test.ts src/commands/status.test-support.ts src/commands/status.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

## Known proof notes
- The branch was rebased onto current `origin/main`; the previous plugin-sdk CI failure in `src/plugin-sdk/provider-catalog-shared.test.ts` passes on the rebased branch.
- Global `corepack pnpm format:check` reports unrelated pre-existing formatting issues outside the touched files; the changed source files pass the scoped formatter check.
